description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. A neurosurgeon needs a 3D-printable model of ONLY the upper calvarium (skull cap) for pre-operative planning, excluding the facial skeleton and base of the skull. Segment the bone and restrict the model to the upper calvarium (roughly from the superior orbital rim upward). Export the 3D surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/calvarium_only.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
